events.text: Daniel Amartey (Ghana) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Korea Republic 0, Ghana 1. Mohammed Salisu (Ghana) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner    following a set piece situation.
Jung Woo-Young (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Korea Republic 0, Ghana 2. Mohammed Kudus (Ghana) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Jordan Ayew with a cross.
Goal!  Korea Republic 1, Ghana 2. Cho Gue-Sung (Korea Republic) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Lee Kang-In with a cross.
Goal!  Korea Republic 2, Ghana 2. Cho Gue-Sung (Korea Republic) header from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Kim Jin-Su with a cross.
Goal!  Korea Republic 2, Ghana 3. Mohammed Kudus (Ghana) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Iñaki Williams.
Tariq Lamptey (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Kim Young-Gwon (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
